name: TrueRanker
description:
What TrueRanker Does

TrueRanker is designed specifically for monitoring your business's visibility in Google's Local Pack/Maps results across different cities and locations. The key focus is ensuring your Google My Business listing appears prominently for targeted local keywords in the places most relevant to your services or product areas.

‍

Source: TrueRanker

Key Features

  • Track rankings in Google's localized pack/map results  and monitor performance at a city/town level
  • Isolate local ranking data separate from organic web
  • Verify your GMB listing appearance in local results
  • Customize your business name used for tracking
  • Align local optimization to Google's local pack
  • Add keywords to monitor local search rankings for
  • Specify cities and device types for added relevance  
  • Focused on localized keyword rankings vs national
  • See your rank positions for each tracked keyword
  • Access buttons to view the actual local SERP directly
  • Visualize the rankings you want to influence
  • Organize local ranking monitoring by project/website
  • Associate keywords to track at a project level
  • Monitor across multiple local servers if needed

Benefits of TrueRanker

  • Isolate focus solely on critical local rankings so you can target your strategies 
  • Verify your GMB listing's visibility for your target areas
  • Customize tracking for your business name and cities
  • Visualize local rankings to guide your local SEO optimization efforts
  • Organize local campaigns by project for efficiency and quick insights

Pricing

$30 per month (for up to 5 projects)

Pros

✅Ability to directly check GMB listing placement

✅Project structure allows monitoring multiple locations and more control

Cons

❌Can be expensive when tracking multiple locations or keywords (for agencies)

‍
